prompt.fewshot:
Q: Every yumpus is a dumpus. Dumpuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are not bright. Sam is a yumpus. Prove: Sam is not bright.
A: Sam is a yumpus. Every yumpus is a dumpus. Sam is a dumpus. Dumpuses are tumpuses. Sam is a tumpus. Tumpuses are not bright. Sam is not bright.

Q: Each gorpus is a sterpus. Sterpuses are red. Every borpus is a gorpus. Alex is a borpus. Prove: Alex is red.
A: Alex is a borpus. Every borpus is a gorpus. Alex is a gorpus. Each gorpus is a sterpus. Alex is a sterpus. Sterpuses are red. Alex is red.
prompt.instruction: You will be given facts and rules about fictional creatures, then asked to prove a statement. Answer with only the proof: a sequence of statements, one deduction at a time, in the exact style of the examples. End with the statement to be proven.
